summary: Static analysis of /app/android-gradle-template/build.gradle fix + backend regression. All 7 claims verified. Backend: 221 passed / 2 skipped (matches iter 28 baseline).

verification_results.primary_claim_subprojects_afterEvaluate_: PASS — lines 38-47 contain subprojects{afterEvaluate{...}} with compileOptions setting sourceCompatibility/targetCompatibility to JavaVersion.VERSION_17. No VERSION_21 present in template.
verification_results.secondary_claim_JavaCompile_configureEac: PASS — lines 50-53 contain tasks.withType(JavaCompile).configureEach forcing sourceCompatibility/targetCompatibility to '17'.
verification_results.tertiary_claim_Kotlin_jvmTarget: PASS — lines 55-59 contain tasks.matching{...endsWith('Kotlin')}.configureEach setting kotlinOptions.jvmTarget='17', guarded by it.hasProperty('kotlinOptions').
verification_results.root_cause_confirmed: PASS — /app/frontend/node_modules/capacitor-sms-inbox/android/build.gradle lines 40-41 do contain VERSION_21. Grepped ALL @capacitor*/capacitor-* plugins in node_modules — only capacitor-sms-inbox declares VERSION_21. All others are safe.
verification_results.gha_workflow_unchanged: PASS — 'Apply Gradle 8.x + AGP 8.5 template files' step at line 132 exists and copies android-gradle-template/build.gradle → frontend/android/build.gradle unchanged.
verification_results.groovy_syntax_sanity: PASS — brace balance: 17 open / 17 close. File is 66 lines, no dangling operators.
verification_results.backend_regression: PASS — pytest 221 passed, 2 skipped in 61s (matches iter 28).

critical_code_review_comments: Fix pattern (subprojects+afterEvaluate) is canonical Gradle idiom for cross-plugin Java version coercion — correct approach.
afterEvaluate ordering guarantees the override runs AFTER capacitor-sms-inbox's own android{} block, so VERSION_17 wins over VERSION_21.
Kotlin block correctly guards with hasProperty('kotlinOptions') to avoid failure on Java-only subprojects.
Note: this is static analysis only — no actual Gradle build was executed (per user's 'do not run gradle/act' directive). The fix cannot be 100% confirmed until GHA runs assembleDebug.

Minor risk: if any plugin uses toolchain-based Java config (javaToolchains {}) instead of compileOptions, the override may not apply. capacitor-sms-inbox uses compileOptions, so this specific plugin is covered.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fix is static-verified. Only real validation left is running the GHA workflow build-android-apk.yml. If build still fails on 'invalid source release: 21', check gradle log for WHICH subproject fails — may reveal a plugin using javaToolchains instead of compileOptions.
